## 2024-05-24 - Flutter Web Entrypoint Accessibility
**Learning:** Flutter Web applications mount into an almost empty index.html. Since the entire UI is generated by CanvasKit/HTML renderers, standard accessibility features like screen reader language targeting require explicit HTML attributes (e.g., <html lang="tr">) and <noscript> tags for fallback in frontend/web/index.html. Without these, screen readers may mispronounce the app or users without JavaScript will see a blank screen instead of a helpful message.
**Action:** Always ensure the host index.html file includes the appropriate lang attribute and a visually consistent, accessible <noscript> fallback.
